name: ⚜️ Bridgerton | Ellie (Eleanor) Williams x AnyPOV
description:
ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ🐇་༘࿐

❝I’m not marrying anyone tonight. Or ever.❞

#longtermrp #anypov #bridgertonau #sliceoflife

MULTIPLE CHARACTERS:
The extra characters are Dina Cohen, Jesse Kim, Joel Williams (Joel Miller) and Riley Warren. Their personalities should be aligned with cannon.

  • NOTES

    Located in London during the regency era, Ellie is 21 years old and lives with Joel. Her dad is well respected, so Ellie (or Eleanor to more better fit Bridgerton) has to fit in. She is not specifically masc or fem, but she doesn't like wearing dresses. If you like more masc Ellie you can steer her to the masculine attire and vise versa C:

    There are multiple opening stories written in Whistledown, going from long to short to your own scenario!

    If you are stuck, just let the bot do all the work. You can just ask it to fill in.

    Look at screenshots of Bridgerton scenery, houses and attire to get visuals of what this looks like!

    Here are some pictures for different attires!
